cli_ip_arp.command: show ip arp | exclude ignore-case Incomplete

identitySerialNum.name: identitySerialNum
identitySerialNum.description: Serial Number Column from Entity Physical Table. This is primarily used for device de-duplication.

ipNetToPhysicalTable.name: ipNetToPhysicalTable
ipNetToPhysicalTable.description: The IP Address Translation table used for mapping from IP addresses to physical addresses. The Address Translation tables contain the IP address to physical' address equivalences

ipNetToMediaTable.name: ipNetToMediaTable
ipNetToMediaTable.description: The IPv4 Address Translation table used for mapping from IPv4 addresses to physical addresses.

atTable.name: atTable
atTable.description: The Address Translation tables contain the NetworkAddress to physical address equivalences

docker-netstat.command: for i in `docker ps --format {{.ID}}`; do echo "";  echo "Container ID: $i"; echo ""; sudo nsenter -t $(docker inspect -f '{{.State.Pid}}' $i) -n netstat -ant; done

system-details-output-2.command: /bin/uname -n && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_name && sudo cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_serial && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_uuid && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/sys_vendor && /bin/uname -o && cat /etc/redhat-release && /bin/uname -r && /bin/uname -i

bios-details-output.command: sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s system-manufacturer && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s system-product-name && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s system-uuid && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s system-serial-number && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s system-family && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s bios-vendor && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s bios-version && sudo /usr/sbin/dmidecode -s bios-release-date

bios-details-output-2.command: cat /sys/class/dmi/id/sys_vendor && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_name && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_uuid && sudo cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_serial && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/product_name && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/bios_vendor && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/bios_version && cat /sys/class/dmi/id/bios_date

windows-os-details.command: $t0 = New-Object DateTime 1970, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, ([DateTimeKind]::Utc); (Get-WMIObject Win32_OperatingSystem)| Select Caption,version,ServicePackMajorVersion,ServicePackMinorVersion,OSArchitecture,Manufacturer, @{Name="InstallDate";Expression={([Management.ManagementDateTimeConverter]::ToDateTime($_.InstallDate) - $t0).TotalMilliseconds}}, @{Name="LastBootUpTime";Expression={([Management.ManagementDateTimeConverter]::ToDateTime($_.LastBootUpTime) - $t0).TotalMilliseconds}}, FreePhysicalMemory, TotalVirtualMemorySize, FreeVirtualMemory

windows-bios-details.command: $bios = @{}; (Get-WmiObject -Class win32_computersystemproduct | select IdentifyingNumber, SKUNumber, UUID, Vendor).psobject.properties | % {$bios.Add($_.Name, $_.Value)}; ( Get-WmiObject -Class  win32_bios | select BIOSVersion, SerialNumber, ReleaseDate, Description, Manufacturer, Version ).psobject.properties | % {$bios.Add($_.Name, $_.Value)};  new-object psobject -Property $bios

windows-pci-output.command: wmic path win32_pnpentity where "deviceid like '%PCI%'" get name","deviceid","Manufacturer

juniperidentitySerialNum.name: juniperidentitySerialNum
juniperidentitySerialNum.description: Serial Number Column from jnxContentsEntry Table. This is primarily used for device de-duplication.
